word: H4571 - מָעַד - mâʻad - maw-ad' - Make to shake

sections.paragraph:
Original: מעד

Transliteration: mâ‛ad

Phonetic: maw-ad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to slip, slide, totter, shake
    1. (Qal) to slip
    2. (Hiphil) to cause or make to shake or totter

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1226

Part(s) of speech: Verb
